reviews.comment:
Muy buena la atención de la playa de despacho de combustible. Lo único malo que el servi club no atiende las 24hs (siendo A.C.A )

(Translated by Google)
The service at the fuel station is very good. The only downside is that the service club isn't open 24 hours a day (it's A.C.A.).

reviews.comment:
Esta en la zona norte de cafayate. En la enteada de la ciudad

It's in the northern part of Cafayate, at the entrance to the city.

reviews.comment:
Muy bien los baños y el mini super.
Es la única estación de servicio en la zona.
Lo único malo es que siempre hay espera para reabastecer el combustible.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms and mini-market are great.
It's the only gas station in the area.
The only downside is that there's always a wait to refuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3723316147645973523/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNncUxQNi13RRAB

reviews.comment:
X la falta de personal  aveces hay q hacer una cola bastante cansadora para cargar nafta  xq solo hay una sola persona atendiendo los surtidores

(Translated by Google)
Due to staff shortages, sometimes you have to wait in a very tiring queue to fill up with gas because there is only one person attending the pumps.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3723316147645973523/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURReXBEUDNRRRAB
